---
name: Simulation Issue
about: Report numerical convergence, physics anomalies, or simulation solver crashes
title: '[SIM] '
labels: simulation, physics
assignees: ''
---

## Simulation Problem Description
Describe the simulation run, Semimajor axis altitude, step size, and the solver (e.g. Kepler, RK45) that encountered the issue.

## Expected Physics Behavior
What is the mathematically or physically correct behavior according to orbital mechanics/thermal physics?

## Verification Output
Provide logs or errors indicating convergence failure, energy conservation violations, or step-size underflows.

## Reproduction Steps / Script
Provide the python script or configuration code to reproduce the simulation run.
